query: Can you do a code review on my PR?
Could you audit this code for quality before I merge it?
Help me debug this error: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'map'). It happens when the API returns empty data
Create unit tests for the UserService class — I need full coverage including edge cases for register, login, and password reset methods

Rewrite this code to be more readable — the logic is correct but my team lead says it's too clever and hard to follow

```python
def f(n): return n if n<2 else f(n-1)+f(n-2)
```

Translate this Python data processing script to Go — we need it to run as a compiled binary in our CI pipeline

```python
import csv
def process(filepath):
    with open(filepath) as f:
        reader = csv.DictReader(f)
        return [r for r in reader if int(r['age']) > 18]
```
Can you review this PR? https://github.com/our-company/backend-api/pull/847 — it adds rate limiting to our public endpoints and my teammate wants it merged today
I need to add rate limiting to our Express API — can you implement it? Something like 100 requests per minute per IP, with a Redis backend for distributed rate limiting across multiple instances
